column15:
Arkis API docs: https://docs.arkis.xyz/home/for-developers

Only relevant endpoints are https://api.arkis.xyz/e/v1/vaults to fetch vault ids associated to particular Prime Agent's API key, and https://api.arkis.xyz/e/v1/vaults/{vault_id} to fetch current exposures for each vault.

Unfortunately, I lost Spark's Arkis API Key, so it will need to be requested again.

Anchorage API docs: https://developers.anchorage.com/ (password is "anchor")

Routes applicable to Prime Agent allocations are found under "Vaults" and within the "Atlas" category, under "Collateral Management".

We can retrieve the principals of all loans for a particular Prime Agent, given their read-only API key ${AGENT_KEY}, with the following:
curl -X GET "https://api.anchorage.com/v2/collateral_management/exposures" \
  -H "Api-Access-Key: ${AGENT_KEY}" \
  -H "Accept: application/json"

column14:
Securitize API is private, but Stablewatch has a key.
For pricing, the asset is hardcoded at $1, it doesn't matter if fetch the price via oracle or not.
For revenues, the yield can be retrieved via API, but we should calculate revenue based on actual rewards received by ALM, not the API.
